The '''Battle of the [[Llon Nebulae/Legends|Llon Nebulae]]''' was a battle in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Background==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were returning from a mission when they spotted a fleet, which they believed to be the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy's]] new [[Storm Fleet]], on its way to [[Cyphar/Legends|Cyphar]].

==The battle==
After receiving data on the ships, the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] took off, trying to stop the CIS fleet. Skywalker led them into an asteroid field and managed to evade the asteroids—using the Force to perform near-impossible maneuvers. He destroyed two CIS freighters and made the last retreat from the battle.

{{Battle-stub}}
